title: clusia rosea
intro: Clusia rosea, also known as the blood tree or ball tree, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its unique, round trunk and red, blood-red sap that can be found in its branches and trunk. The medicinal properties of Clusia rosea include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it useful in treating wounds and preventing infection. The health benefits of the plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers. Clusia rosea can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, ointments, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
